articles.title: Man kills seven of his children, and an eighth child, in Louisiana mass shooting
articles.summary: The children, aged from one to 14 years old, were killed in a shooting that police are describing as a "domestic disturbance".

articles.title: Oil prices rise after Trump says Iranian ship seized
articles.summary: Energy markets have seen wild swings since the US and Israel attacked Iran on 28 February.

articles.summary: Authorities say the officers have been suspended and an investigation into their actions is under way.

articles.title: Rumen Radev set to win Bulgarian Parliamentary election
articles.summary: Early results put his Progressive Bulgaria on 45%, well ahead of the liberal PP-DB coalition, which stood at 15%.

articles.title: Thousands of Parisians evacuated as WW2 bomb detonated
articles.summary: Residents within a 450m radius of the device were told to leave their homes while it was neutralised.

articles.title: Ontario Premier Doug Ford agrees to sell $21m private jet following outcry

articles.summary: The pontiff says his remarks have been misinterpreted after a spat with the US president.
